scope.dependency_radius: README, INDEX, AGENTS, internal guide references, workflow artifacts
constraints: Preserve human-facing entry points while moving files
non_goals: No broad rewrite of document technical content

inputs.architecture_target: Clarify .dev information architecture and reduce overlap among collaboration guides, guides, and standards
user_constraints: Proceed in stages and commit along the way

steps: Renamed .dev/ai-skill-guides and moved it under .dev/guides/ai-collaboration-guides with updated references
Split .dev/guides into design-guides, implementation-guides, and learning-guides
Moved non-standard documents out of .dev/standards into the appropriate guide folders
Updated README, INDEX, AGENTS, scripts, and internal references
Expanded .dev/guides/README.MD and .dev/standards/README.md with detailed indexes and placement rules
validation: Old path references only remain in historical proposal/workflow context
Current repo indexes point to the new locations
Guides and standards now document what belongs in each directory
Working tree was verified clean after execution before the detail-polish step
deferred_items: Optionally add per-subdirectory READMEs if future guide volume increases

results.summary: Completed the .dev documentation structure refactor, including the AI collaboration guide rename, guides subcategorization, standards cleanup, and directory-level README/index refinement.
